stories.title: **Headline:** NFCA Week 10 Poll Official — Oklahoma Reaches No. 1 for First Time in 2026

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
OFFICIAL: Oklahoma is No. 1 in the NFCA Week 10 Coaches Poll — the Sooners' first No. 1 of 2026.

Red River series win + Kendall Wells' historic season = poll position earned.

The road to Oklahoma City runs through Norman. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 10 top 5:

No. 1 Oklahoma
No. 2 Alabama
No. 3 Texas Tech
No. 4 Texas
No. 5 Nebraska

FSU drops out of the top 5 after Stanford swept them. What a shift in college softball. #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Oklahoma Reaches No. 1 in NFCA Week 10 Coaches Poll for First Time in 2026

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells Is 6 Away — OU Freshman Chases NCAA All-Time HR Record

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells has 31 home runs.

Lauren Espinoza's all-time NCAA record is 37 (Arizona, 1995).

That's 6 away with 12+ games to play.

This might be the most watched record chase in college softball history. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Put it in perspective: Kendall Wells hit No. 31 in her 43rd game as a freshman.

Lauren Espinoza's all-time record of 37 took a full season in 1995.

Wells is doing it at a pace the sport has never seen. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Is 6 Home Runs from NCAA History — and She's Just Getting Started

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

Below shows "6 AWAY FROM NCAA HISTORY." Use golden/amber accent colors on dark navy. Space for text overlay. Athletic achievement aesthetic.
- **Usage:** Story 2 social (X + FB caption)

stories.title: **Headline:** Stanford Shakes Up the ACC — Seminoles Drop, Cardinal Re-Enter Top 25

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Stanford swept FSU — and the polls noticed.

The Cardinal re-entered the Top 25. FSU dropped sharply. Virginia Tech cracked the top 10.

The ACC race just got a lot more interesting. #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Stanford's Sweep of Florida State Reshapes the ACC Race and the National Rankings

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Wins Utah Series — Canady Improves to 17-2, Raiders Rebound Strong

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Texas Tech takes the Utah series 2-1. NiJaree Canady bounced back in Game 3 — 11 Ks, improved to 17-2.

Red Raiders are 40-3, 16-2 in Big 12. Still the measuring stick. #TexasTech #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Texas Tech Wins Utah Series 2-1 — Canady Bounces Back With 11 Strikeouts in Game 3

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Leads Big Ten at 14-1 — Chasing First Conference Title Since Joining in 2011

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nebraska is 14-1 in the Big Ten and has swept 4 of 5 conference series.

They have never won a Big Ten regular season title since joining in 2011.

This year might be the one. #Huskers #BigTen #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Nebraska Leads the Big Ten at 14-1 — Could 2026 Finally Be the Year?

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Mid-week softball: keep your eyes on Kendall Wells in Oklahoma's next game.

She's 6 homers from the NCAA all-time record. Any game, any at-bat could be history.

That's must-watch softball. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball
